message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.str.get_dummies (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.str.get_dummies
(returns a DataFrame with 0/1 columns per distinct token):

- str_get_dummies_pipe: classic '|' separator, 3-row tag list
- str_get_dummies_comma: ',' separator, 2-row tag list with order
  variation across rows

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
series.str.get_dummies(sep=...)), runs the Rust series.str().
get_dummies(sep), and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected.
SeriesStrGetDummies was already wired through the Frame response
branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-b1xxa]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
